name: weaver-game
description: Weaver - Block puzzle game with BFS color clusters

scripts.build: robocopy index.html www /IS /IT & robocopy style.css www /IS /IT & robocopy src www\src /E /IS /IT & robocopy assets www\assets /E /IS /IT & exit 0
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
